Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 30 
CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) files. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the 
variables. 
 ALZH 

LABEL: Alzheimer's Disease End-of-Year Indicator
